programmes.show_description: Everybody's free to feel good and Rozalla knows it! So let's join her as she takes us on a journey of her 40 favourite feel good anthems from back in the day.
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!
Melodic synths, pumping beats and shout out loud lyrics. Live your best life with some Eurodance NRG!
The ultimate throwback! We're bringing you the hottest Clubland belters from 1990 to 1999. Dust off those dancing shoes and pump the party!
Ahh, the one hit wonder. They sneak up on us from nowhere, top the charts for a week or two and then vanish into obscurity. Never to return!

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!
programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
The Clubland CD was born over 20 years ago and changed dance music forever! Delivering upfront beats, happy vibes and some crazy vids. This is our celebration of Clubland 1 to 4.

programmes.show_name: Party Rock is in the House!
programmes.show_description: Bangin' party tunes for the ultimate dance karaoke session, if that's your thing. Clubland does it best!
Massive tunes and huge anthems. Each track a chart topping No.1 dance hit! This is the best of the best, these are the legends.
Join Stephanie Hirst as she spins some awesome belters! From 2010 to 2019! Here's the lowdown on her fav 3 tracks of each year.
We give you heavy hits, vocal anthems, dirty beats and bangin' basslines. This is the 2010s at it finest!
In order - nine hours of banging floor-fillers spanning three decades of dance! It's pretty relentless stuff, so don't say we didn't warn you.

DJ Andi Durrant gives us a deep dive into some of the most iconic samples in dance music. Legendary vocals, elusive disco grooves and some of his favourite hidden gems!

The weekend, the best time of the week! Here's 50 massive anthems to get you going. Think Calvin, Sigala, Guetta and Tinie Tempah - you get the picture!
